languages.text: "Выскажусь, как эксперт. Налицо все признаки того, что неведомая тварь — древний ксенос, хитроумный и опасный. Обычных методов недостаточно, чтобы справиться с ним. Лишь Движущая Сила, благословенная энергия, даруемая нам Омниссией, способна пробить защиту этого создания. Вооружите отряд наиболее эффективных бойцов электродуговыми ружьями и шоковыми гранатами, и отправьте в места, где чужак орудует наиболее часто".

"Speaking as an expert, all evidence indicates that the unknown creature is an ancient xenos, cunning and dangerous. Conventional methods will be inadequate at overcoming it. Only the Motive Force, the blessed energy granted to us by the Omnissiah, can bypass this creature's defences. Equip a squad of the most effective fighters with arc rifles and shock grenades, and deploy them at locations where the xenos is most active."
languages.original_text: "Выскажусь, как эксперт. Налицо все признаки того, что неведомая тварь — древний ксенос, хитроумный и опасный. Обычных методов недостаточно, чтобы справиться с ним. Лишь Движущая Сила, благословенная энергия, даруемая нам Омниссией, способна пробить защиту этого создания. Вооружите отряд наиболее эффективных бойцов электродуговыми ружьями и шоковыми гранатами, и отправьте в места, где чужак орудует наиболее часто".

traits.locale_text: "I shall speak as an expert. All signs indicate that the unknown creature is an ancient xenos, cunning and dangerous. Conventional methods are insufficient to overcome it. Only the Motive Force, the blessed energy granted to us by the Omnissiah, can pierce this creature's defences. Equip a squad of the most effective fighters with arc-rifles and shock grenades, and deploy them to the locations where the alien is most active."

Only the Motive Force, the blessed energy granted to us by the Omnissiah, can pierce this creature's defences. Equip a squad of the most effective fighters with arc-rifles and shock grenades, and deploy them to the locations where the alien is most active."

Only the Motive Force, the blessed energy granted to us by the Omnissiah, can bypass this creature's defences. Equip a squad of the most effective fighters with arc rifles and shock grenades, and deploy them at locations where the xenos is most active."

"Speaking as an expert, all evidence indicates that the unknown creature is an ancient xenos, cunning and dangerous. Conventional methods will be inadequate at overcoming it. Only the Motive Force, the blessed energy granted to us by the Omnissiah, can bypass this creature's defences. Equip a squad of the most effective fighters with arc rifles and shock grenades, and deploy them at locations where the xenos is most active."

languages.text: "Aus Expertensicht deutet alles darauf hin, dass die unbekannte Kreatur ein alter Xenos ist, listenreich und gefährlich. Mit konventionellen Methoden werden wir ihr nicht beikommen. Nur die Antriebskraft, die gesegnete Energie, die uns der Omnissiah gewährt, kann die Verteidigung dieser Kreatur überwinden. Rüstet einen Trupp unserer besten Kämpfer mit Lichtbogen-Gewehren und Schockgranaten aus und stationiert sie an Positionen, an denen der Xenos besonders aktiv ist."
languages.original_text: "Speaking as an expert, all evidence indicates that the unknown creature is an ancient xenos, cunning and dangerous. Conventional methods will be inadequate at overcoming it. Only the Motive Force, the blessed energy granted to us by the Omnissiah, can bypass this creature's defences. Equip a squad of the most effective fighters with arc rifles and shock grenades, and deploy them at locations where the xenos is most active."

traits.locale_text: "Aus Expertensicht deutet alles darauf hin, dass die unbekannte Kreatur ein alter Xenos ist, listenreich und gefährlich. Mit konventionellen Methoden werden wir ihr nicht beikommen. Nur die Antriebskraft, die gesegnete Energie, die uns der Omnissiah gewährt, kann die Verteidigung dieser Kreatur überwinden. Rüstet einen Trupp unserer besten Kämpfer mit Lichtbogen-Gewehren und Schockgranaten aus und stationiert sie an Positionen, an denen der Xenos besonders aktiv ist."

languages.text: « En ma qualité d'expert, je peux confirmer que tout indique que la créature inconnue est d'origine xénos, fort ancienne, fourbe et particulièrement dangereuse. Des méthodes conventionnelles ne suffiraient pas à la vaincre. Seule la Force Motrice, l'énergie bénie qui nous est conférée par l'Omnimessie, saurait outrepasser les défenses de la créature. Équipez une escouade des combattants les plus efficaces d'électrofusils et de grenades Shock, puis déployez-la là où le xénos est le plus actif. »
languages.original_text: "Speaking as an expert, all evidence indicates that the unknown creature is an ancient xenos, cunning and dangerous. Conventional methods will be inadequate at overcoming it. Only the Motive Force, the blessed energy granted to us by the Omnissiah, can bypass this creature's defences. Equip a squad of the most effective fighters with arc rifles and shock grenades, and deploy them at locations where the xenos is most active."

traits.locale_text: « En ma qualité d'expert, je peux confirmer que tout indique que la créature inconnue est d'origine xénos, fort ancienne, fourbe et particulièrement dangereuse. Des méthodes conventionnelles ne suffiraient pas à la vaincre. Seule la Force Motrice, l'énergie bénie qui nous est conférée par l'Omnimessie, saurait outrepasser les défenses de la créature. Équipez une escouade des combattants les plus efficaces d'électrofusils et de grenades Shock, puis déployez-la là où le xénos est le plus actif. »

languages.text: «Desde mi experto punto de vista, todas las pruebas indican que la criatura desconocida es un xenos antiguo, astuto y peligroso. Los métodos convencionales no bastarán para derrotarlo. Solo la Fuerza Motriz, la energía bendita que nos otorga el Omnissiah, puede atravesar las defensas de esta criatura. Equipe a un escuadrón de guerreros muy eficaces con rifles voltaicos y granadas aturdidoras y despliéguelos en las ubicaciones de mayor actividad xenos».
languages.original_text: "Speaking as an expert, all evidence indicates that the unknown creature is an ancient xenos, cunning and dangerous. Conventional methods will be inadequate at overcoming it. Only the Motive Force, the blessed energy granted to us by the Omnissiah, can bypass this creature's defences. Equip a squad of the most effective fighters with arc rifles and shock grenades, and deploy them at locations where the xenos is most active."

traits.locale_text: «Desde mi experto punto de vista, todas las pruebas indican que la criatura desconocida es un xenos antiguo, astuto y peligroso. Los métodos convencionales no bastarán para derrotarlo. Solo la Fuerza Motriz, la energía bendita que nos otorga el Omnissiah, puede atravesar las defensas de esta criatura. Equipe a un escuadrón de guerreros muy eficaces con rifles voltaicos y granadas aturdidoras y despliéguelos en las ubicaciones de mayor actividad xenos».

languages.text: "Bir uzman olarak söylüyorum: Tüm kanıtlar bu bilinmeyen yaratığın kadim, kurnaz ve tehlikeli bir zeno olduğunu gösteriyor. Geleneksel yöntemler, üstesinden gelmekte yetersiz kalacaktır. Ancak Devinim Gücü, yani Hermesih'in bize bahşettiği kutsal enerji bu yaratığın savunmasını aşabilir. En yetkin savaşçılardan oluşan bir mangayı volt atım tüfekleri ve şok bombalarıyla donatıp onları zenonun en aktif olduğu yerlere konuşlandıralım."
languages.original_text: "Speaking as an expert, all evidence indicates that the unknown creature is an ancient xenos, cunning and dangerous. Conventional methods will be inadequate at overcoming it. Only the Motive Force, the blessed energy granted to us by the Omnissiah, can bypass this creature's defences. Equip a squad of the most effective fighters with arc rifles and shock grenades, and deploy them at locations where the xenos is most active."

traits.locale_text: "Bir uzman olarak söylüyorum: Tüm kanıtlar bu bilinmeyen yaratığın kadim, kurnaz ve tehlikeli bir zeno olduğunu gösteriyor. Geleneksel yöntemler, üstesinden gelmekte yetersiz kalacaktır. Ancak Devinim Gücü, yani Hermesih'in bize bahşettiği kutsal enerji bu yaratığın savunmasını aşabilir. En yetkin savaşçılardan oluşan bir mangayı volt atım tüfekleri ve şok bombalarıyla donatıp onları zenonun en aktif olduğu yerlere konuşlandıralım."

languages.text: “作为专家，我认为所有证据都表明，这个未知生物是一种古老的异形，狡猾且危险。常规方法不足以将其制服。只有欧姆尼塞亚赐予我们的神圣能量，源力才能突破这种生物的防御。为一支精锐小队配备电弧步枪和电击手雷，再将他们部署到该异形活动最频繁的区域。”
languages.original_text: "Speaking as an expert, all evidence indicates that the unknown creature is an ancient xenos, cunning and dangerous. Conventional methods will be inadequate at overcoming it. Only the Motive Force, the blessed energy granted to us by the Omnissiah, can bypass this creature's defences. Equip a squad of the most effective fighters with arc rifles and shock grenades, and deploy them at locations where the xenos is most active."
